year: The year in which the vehicles were offered by Elexion Automotive
feature: The specific feature offered in the vehicles by Elexion Automotive
percentage_of_vehicles: The percentage of vehicles that offered the specified feature in the respective year
feature_relevance: A brief description on how the feature is related or unrelated to other aspects of the vehicle
Safety features are unrelated to vehicle's aesthetic options or entertainment features.
Comfort features are unrelated to vehicle performance or safety options.
Safety features are unrelated to vehicle's performance or fuel efficiency.
Vehicle security features are unrelated to battery testing protocols, EV battery endurance, or reliability.
Voice control options are unrelated to vehicle performance or durability.
Safety features are unrelated to vehicle's aesthetic options or seating comfort.
Wireless connectivity options are unrelated to vehicle safety features or fuel efficiency.
Display features are unrelated to vehicle's fuel efficiency or performance.
Cruise control features are unrelated to vehicle interior comfort features or entertainment options.
Charging options are unrelated to vehicle safety features or performance.
